text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Admire Vega has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We finish our daily training, and I return to my
office to get some other work done when...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me.
choice_data_list: Oh, Ayabe. I thought you'd already left.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...There's something I want to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I asked you to hold onto something... Do you
remember?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Here... Can you hold on to it?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I don't really know what I want to
do.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Do I really want to go? Or am I just... I don't
know.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
But it's not like seeing a special starry sky doesn't
interest me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now I suddenly remember. Admire Vega asked
me to keep a hot spring vacation ticket a while
ago. It must be weighing on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And since she's bringing it up out of nowhere,
that must mean...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I would like to go.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I've heard the night sky is beautiful there. So, I'd
like to see it.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Would you take me with you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list: Did you enjoy seeing the stars?
Did you enjoy seeing the stars?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Very much.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But since we're here...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I think I'd like to go for a walk.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Would you come with me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: We're here together, aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You've always come along with me... You even
came here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The late-night air is chilly. Each breath escapes in
a white cloud that slowly drifts away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those tiny puffs of air look like nebulae. Admire
Vega exhales a small universe as she softly
speaks.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...It's so beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I felt like I could connect with my sister.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to talk with her is why I began looking at
the stars. Back home, during any free moment I
had, I'd wrap myself in a blanket and go out onto
the balcony.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
And eventually, I grew an interest in the stars
themselves.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I would read, do research, and listen to talks at
planetariums.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I told my sister about everything I learned.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I told her about the stories of constellations and
the mysteries of the vastness of space.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Those are fun and precious memories to me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So... that's why I love stargazing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Whenever I look to the stars, I think of her.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I might not be able to talk to her anymore... but
that doesn't change the fact that the stars bring
us closer together.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The stars are very dear to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega speaks in a gentle voice, which itself
conveys her cherished memories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She falls silent, and we walk together under the
stars for some time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a moment, I wonder if I should say something
too. Then all of a sudden...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I stand still.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hm? What is it?
choice_data_list: Do you have a favorite constellation?
Do you have a favorite constellation?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, I do.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Obviously I feel very connected to Gemini. But
there's another...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Crux. ...Do you know it?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's the smallest of all eighty-eight constellations,
but it serves as a guide for travelers going south.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
We can't see it from here. It's a little difficult to
see from the northern hemisphere.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Which is why...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'd like to go see it someday.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I think that'd be nice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her face is peaceful as she looks up at the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I hope she gets to travel south and see it one day.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Whenever I get that chance...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Would you follow me there too?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (...Someday I'll ask you.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Admire Vega and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
